creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Sat, Jan 05, 2002 at 08:55:41AM -0800, Gianluca Sordiglioni wrote:

> Opening an encrypted DVD with any DVD Player (Xine, Ogle, MPlayer) I get a system panic and I get an automatic reboot.

Please obtain a panic traceback of a debugging crashdump as described
in the handbook, so this problem can be diagnosed.

kris
